breedSize: small breed, medium breed, large breed
ingredients: COMPOSITION: Meat and animal derivatives (chicken 8%), cereals, seeds, oils and fats, derivatives of vegetable origin, minerals, molluscs and crustaceans. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Protein 5.8%, Fat content 5.5%, Crude fibre 1.3%, Crude ash 1.5%, Moisture 71.6%, Omega-3 fatty acids 1.1%, EPA 0.20%, Calcium 0.20%, Phosphorus 0.15%, Sodium 0.08%, Potassium 0.23%, Magnesium 0.03%; per kg: Vitamin A 16,983IU, Vitamin D3 294IU, Vitamin E 242mg. ADDITIVES PER KG: Nutritional additives: 3b103 (Iron) 18.0mg, 3b202 (Iodine) 0.6mg, 3b405 (Copper) 3.0mg, 3b502 (Manganese) 4.0mg, 3b603 (Zinc) 46.4mg.
